title: Tefal Titanium Stone Frying Pan 28 cm, High-Performance Non-Stick Durable Coating, Metal Safe, All Hobs Including Induction, Thermo-Signal, Black, E1050644
features: FULL COMPATIBILITY: Compatible with gas, electric, ceramic and induction hobs
PERFECT SEARING: Engineered with Tefal’s Thermo-Signal technology, which indicates the ideal time to start cooking, our cookware is built to transform every meal—for revolutionary culinary results
WORLD #1: Tefal, the world #1 in cookware (Source: Euromonitor International Limited, Home and Garden 2024 edition, brand retail value RSP, 2023 data).
*Source: Independent data for non-stick cookware in sales value (April 24 - March 25) excluding trade brands.

Enhanced features, including Tefal's heat indicator zone and advanced induction technology, come together with a robust design for the perfect cookware range. *Independent abrasion tests in January 2024 of top-selling branded competitor products in volume from Independent UK Panel Data (September 2022-August 2023). Metal spatula safe The non-stick coating has been designed to withstand the use of metal utensils, for everyday convenience (Knives, forks, and whisks excluded). Perfect searing Tefal’s Thermo-Signal technology, which indicates the ideal time to start cooking, transforms every meal—for revolutionary culinary results. All hobs including induction These frying pans are versatile, as they can be used on all types of hobs, including induction. Previous page Next page
